name: Workdown
//: postCreate runs once. The find catches root-owned files left behind by host-side editors (relevant on Windows + WSL2 + Docker Desktop, no-op on Linux/macOS). The volumes start empty so walking them here is free.
postCreateCommand: sudo find ${containerWorkspaceFolder} -not -user $(id -u) -exec chown $(whoami) {} + && cargo --version && rustc --version && npm --prefix ui ci && cargo xtask gen-types
//2: postStart/postAttach run frequently. Same heal, but prune the build-artifact volumes — those are container-managed once postCreate has chowned them, so re-walking them on every attach is wasted I/O.
